title: Metamorphoses X: Orpheus and Eurydice
description: Orpheus descends to the underworld to retrieve his wife, and loses her by looking back — the most retold myth in Western art.
introduction: Orpheus descends to the underworld to retrieve his wife, and loses her by looking back — the most retold myth in Western art.

translation.text: He looked back. In that moment, she slipped away. He reached for her but grasped only air.
